subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the most sanctified, most holy Court of the Desired One, Who hath caused the Kawthar of utterance to flow upon hallowed ground [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از کوثر بیان بر ارض مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God
